name: Helena
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Guardian Champion
factionTrait.text: A guardian moves the turn token +1 step when they have their banner on an objective hex during the end phase.

uniqueTraits.name: Banner Bearer
uniqueTraits.text: Helena cannot make claim actions. During the end phase, if she is not knocked out, Helena counts as a banner for the purposes of gaining steps on the battle ladder.

ultimate.name: Call to Arms
ultimate.text: Follower units of all friendly champions in range, immediately make recruit actions up to maximum unit size.

plotSkills.name: Rally the Troops
plotSkills.text: The Rallied Peasants immediately make up to 2 recruit actions.

plotSkills.name: Lead the Charge
plotSkills.text: Move Helena up to 1 hex. Then move each Rallied Peasant that is within range up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Shield Push
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

traits.name: Devoted
traits.text: A Rallied Peasant has +1 {dodge} and {protection} while it is within 2 hexes of Helena.

plotSkills.name: Prayer
plotSkills.text: If Helena is within range, remove up to 1 wound from Helena.

clashSkills.name: Prayer
clashSkills.text: If Helena is within range, remove up to 1 wound from Helena.

clashSkills.name: Will of the People
clashSkills.text: This skill gains +1 {accuracy_die} and +1 {damage_die} for each Rallied Peasant adjacent to the target.
